creator: chris@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems that I used to be able to query

     http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/man.cgi?manpage

but now, it simply says it cannot find the page, no matter what I specify.
However,

     http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=manpage

works.

Fix: 

Don't know, the real man.cgi is not in the www tree.
How-To-Repeat: 
See description.
